home.title: Team vacation plans
home.description: Connect to team MCP, then manage vacations from your favorite GPT interface.

onboardingHint.before: Need a quick guide? Open onboarding with the

preview.title: Calendar is preview only
preview.description: Web calendar is read-only preview. Requests are managed via MCP (and later via Telegram bot).

statuses.title: Two request statuses
statuses.description: Pending request is a half-circle dot. Approved request is a filled circle dot.

admins.title: Admins approve requests
admins.description: Admins review and approve requests. Your profile name and color can be changed via MCP config.

intro.beforeCode: This page shows the connection format only. Real credentials are issued by an admin through MCP tool

important.title: Important
important.text: The token below is fictional and will never work in production:

step1.beforeCode: Ask an admin to create your user with MCP tool

steps.step2: Receive your personal MCP token from the admin.
steps.step3: Open Cursor MCP settings and paste config similar to the example below.
steps.step4: Replace both URL and token with real values from your admin.
